ideation: This sequence mimics the act of someone holding a hamburger and taking a bite. It starts with both arms extended forward, palms upward, as if presenting the hamburger. Then, one arm moves up to take a bite, and finally, both arms return to a relaxed position.  The movement is designed to be smooth and natural, but with distinct keyframes.

frames.beat: arms present burger forward, palms up
left arm lifts to take a big bite
